668-
669-Runs once per provider request; retries reuse the same headers rather than re-firing the hook.
670-
671:#### before_provider_request
672-
673-Fired after the provider-specific payload is built, right before the request is sent. Handlers run in extension load order. Returning `undefined` keeps the payload unchanged. Returning any other value replaces the payload for later handlers and for the actual request.
674-
675-This hook can rewrite provider-level system instructions or remove them entirely. Those payload-level changes are not reflected by `ctx.getSystemPrompt()`, which reports Pi's system prompt string rather than the final serialized provider payload.
676-
677-```typescript
678:pi.on("before_provider_request", (event, ctx) => {
679-  console.log(JSON.stringify(event.payload, null, 2));
680-
681-  // Optional: replace payload
682-  // return { ...event.payload, temperature: 0 };
683-});
684-```
685-
686-This is mainly useful for debugging provider serialization and cache behavior.
687-
688-#### after_provider_response
689-
690-Fired after an HTTP response is received and before its stream body is consumed. Handlers run in extension load order.
691-
692-```typescript
693-pi.on("after_provider_response", (event, ctx) => {
--
1057-
1058-Returns Pi's current system prompt string.
1059-
1060-- During `before_agent_start`, this reflects chained system-prompt changes made so far for the current turn.
1061-- It does not include later `context` message mutations.
1062:- It does not include `before_provider_request` payload rewrites.
1063-- If later-loaded extensions run after yours, they can still change what is ultimately sent.
1064-
1065-```typescript

text:
Implemented the 7 requested pi-cc-tui statusline features.

Changed files: `pi-cc-tui/extensions/statusline.ts`.

Validation:
- TypeScript syntax check passed with Node type stripping.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Commit `6c54ffa` created and pushed to `origin/master`.
- No staged files remain.

Open risks/questions:
- “Orange” and red both use Pi’s `error` theme token; usage above 95% is additionally bold.
- TTFT/TPS depend on streaming `message_update` usage counters.
- Existing `.pi-subagents/artifacts/*` files remain untracked and were intentionally not modified.

Recommended next step: pull/reload the installed package and test `/cc-tui all`, then restore desired defaults with `/cc-tui only model git context output`.

```acceptance-report
{
  "criteriaSatisfied": [
    {
      "id": "criterion-1",
      "status": "satisfied",
      "evidence": "Only pi-cc-tui/extensions/statusline.ts was changed; it now implements context thresholds, separators, persistent segment configuration, thinking, cost, TTFT/TPS, and extension-status segments."
    }
  ],
  "changedFiles": [
    "pi-cc-tui/extensions/statusline.ts"
  ],
  "testsAddedOrUpdated": [],
  "commandsRun": [
    {
      "command": "node --experimental-strip-types --check pi-cc-tui/extensions/statusline.ts",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "TypeScript syntax parsed successfully."
    },
    {
      "command": "git diff --check",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "No whitespace errors."
    },
    {
      "command": "git commit -m \"feat(pi-cc-tui): 状态栏升级 — 7 项新特性\"",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "Created commit 6c54ffa."
    },
    {
      "command": "git push",
      "result": "passed",
      "summary": "Pushed commit 6c54ffa to origin/master after one transient SSH failure."
    }
  ],
  "validationOutput": [
    "Statusline supports /cc-tui list|only|show|hide|all|none.",
    "Configuration persists to ~/.pi/agent/config/cc-tui.json.",
    "PI_STATUSLINE_GIT remains opt-in via PI_STATUSLINE_GIT=1.",
    "Local master matches origin/master."
  ],
  "residualRisks": [
    "Theme API exposes error rather than distinct orange/red tokens; >95% context is distinguished with bold.",
    "TTFT/TPS accuracy depends on provider streaming usage updates.",
    "Pre-existing untracked .pi-subagents/artifacts files remain in the working tree."
  ],
  "noStagedFiles": true,
  "diffSummary": "248 insertions and 41 deletions in the existing statusline implementation.",
  "reviewFindings": [
    "no blockers"
  ],
  "manualNotes": "No files under ~/.pi/agent were modified."
}
```
